---
description: "Use when working in components/. Prefer documenting each component with a README.md that explains purpose and required sdkconfig settings."
name: "Component README Requirements"
applyTo: "components/**"
---
# Component README Requirements

- Prefer that every folder under components/ includes a README.md file.
- In each component README.md, include a Purpose section describing what the component does.
- In each component README.md, include an SDKConfig Requirements section listing the sdkconfig options needed to run the component.
- Prefer a one-time sweep to add missing component README.md files across components/.
